channel.title: Battiti
channel.description: Magazine musicale dedicato alle musiche avventurose della contemporaneità, dal jazz all'elettronica sperimentale, dalla black music al rock d'avanguardia, con particolare attenzione alle novità discografiche e alle scene sotterranee italiane e internazionali. Un'ora e mezza di musica che ogni notte, per tutta la settimana, si compone di ascolti differenti: nuove uscite, interviste, concerti e live report, speciali, monografie e interventi realizzati con materiali diversi e ospiti esterni, che trovano nell'alternanza delle proposte, delle voci e dei formati la specificità e il senso della ricerca radiofonica. Un programma a cura di Ghighi Di Paola e Antonia Tessitore con Chiara Colli, Simone Sottili e Nina Terruzzi.
channel.itunes:author: RaiPlaySound

item.title: CTM 2026, Berlino, Reportage di Toni De Martino con la partecipazione di Lukas de Clerck
item.description: SILVIA TAROZZI, L'airone, da "Lucciole" - Unseen Worlds // SILVIA TAROZZI, Lucciole, da "Lucciole" - Unseen Worlds // SHABAKA, Dance In Praise, da "Of The Earth" - Shabaka Records SR001LPB // PHAROAH CHROMIUM, Intro / Riah ach-chark, da "Chronicles of the Arab Cold War" - Discrepant // EFRIM MANUEL MENUCK, The Beauty Of The Sun As It Leaves, da "Gaza Is The Moral Compass" - Beacon Sound // GAZAEBAL, Broken NY, da "UN/Readable Sound – Cities" – autoproduzione // SHAPEDNOISE, Oblivion Step, da "Absurd Matter 2" – Weight Looming // EARTH, Land Of Some Other Order, da "Hex; Or Printing In The Infernal Method" – Southern Lord // FEEO, Sandpit, da "Goodness" – AD 93 // LUKAS DE CLERCK, A Gargling Aulete, da "The Telescopic Aulos Of Atlas" – Ideologic Organ // HILARY WOODS, Offerings, da "Night CRIÚ" – Sacred Bones Records // MILKWEED, Exile Of The Sons Of Uisliu, da "Remscéla" – Broadside Hacks // DANIEL BRANDT, Paradise O.D., da "Without Us" – Erased Tapes Records // ASSYOUTI, The Disintegration Of Eric Omelette, da "The Disintegration Of Eric Omelette" – autoproduzione // EMMA RUTH RUNDLE, Blooms Of Oblivion, da "Engine Of Hell" – Sargent House
item.itunes:title: CTM 2026, Berlino, Reportage di Toni De Martino con la partecipazione di Lukas de Clerck
item.itunes:summary: SILVIA TAROZZI, L'airone, da "Lucciole" - Unseen Worlds // SILVIA TAROZZI, Lucciole, da "Lucciole" - Unseen Worlds // SHABAKA, Dance In Praise, da "Of The Earth" - Shabaka Records SR001LPB // PHAROAH CHROMIUM, Intro / Riah ach-chark, da "Chronicles of the Arab Cold War" - Discrepant // EFRIM MANUEL MENUCK, The Beauty Of The Sun As It Leaves, da "Gaza Is The Moral Compass" - Beacon Sound // GAZAEBAL, Broken NY, da "UN/Readable Sound – Cities" – autoproduzione // SHAPEDNOISE, Oblivion Step, da "Absurd Matter 2" – Weight Looming // EARTH, Land Of Some Other Order, da "Hex; Or Printing In The Infernal Method" – Southern Lord // FEEO, Sandpit, da "Goodness" – AD 93 // LUKAS DE CLERCK, A Gargling Aulete, da "The Telescopic Aulos Of Atlas" – Ideologic Organ // HILARY WOODS, Offerings, da "Night CRIÚ" – Sacred Bones Records // MILKWEED, Exile Of The Sons Of Uisliu, da "Remscéla" – Broadside Hacks // DANIEL BRANDT, Paradise O.D., da "Without Us" – Erased Tapes Records // ASSYOUTI, The Disintegration Of Eric Omelette, da "The Disintegration Of Eric Omelette" – autoproduzione // EMMA RUTH RUNDLE, Blooms Of Oblivion, da "Engine Of Hell" – Sargent House

item.title: Consuelo
item.description: ASHER GAMEDZE, Turnin, da "A Semblance: Of Return" - Northern Spy Records // KIM GORDON, Not Today, da "Play Me" - Matador // DAMILY, Sikilony, da "Fanjiry" - Les Disques Bongo Joe // BONO / BURATTINI, Lonely Blue Star, da "Ora sono un lago" - Maple Death Records // LOS SARA FONTÁN, Laboratorio Giù dall'Arca - Bologna e MITA Centro Culturale - Brescia, 10 - 11 marzo 2026 // GEESE, Islands of Men, da "Getting Killed" – Play It Again Sam // LOS SARA FONTÁN, Zapatos, Selfie, Genocidio, Makeup, da "Consuelo" - Aloud Music // LOS SARA FONTÁN, Megalodón 2, da "Consuelo" - Aloud Music // ONE LEG ONE EYE, Sympathetic Invertebrate Ritual, da "...And Take The Black Worm With Me" – Cold Spring // ONE LEG ONE EYE, Bold And Undaunted Youth, da "...And Take The Black Worm With Me" – Cold Spring // GEESE, Long Island City Here I Come, da "Getting Killed" – Play It Again Sam // PIERPAOLO ZENNI, Green Chimneys, da "N.O.P.E." – Aut Records // VERSO, Now I Write, da "Echoes Of Remembered Things" – Aut Records // JACOPO FAGIOLI, Dome, da "Dialogue" – Aut Records

item.title: BATTITI DAL VIVO Womex 2013: Ebo Taylor Stallet 2025: Indigal

item.title: One Instrument
item.description: GRAND RIVER, Cost What It May, da "All Above" - Editions Mego // ALESSANDRO DI PUCCIO, Ludwig Musser M55 Pro-Vibe Vibraphone (1983), da "Year 2018" - One Instrument // GRAND RIVER, Korg MS-20 1978 Classic, da "Year 2016" - One Instrument // OTTO LINDHOLM, 3/4 BASTA Contrabass (1905), da "Year 2018" - One Instrument // YHDESSA, Vermona E-Piano (1978), da "Year 2018" - One Instrument // JAN HERTZ, Hohner Pigini Freebass Accordion (1980), da "Year 2018" - One Instrument // YAIR ELAZAR GLOTMAN, Contrabass, da "One Instrument Vol.1" - One Instrument // DANIELE DI GREGORIO, Enigma (Adams Alpha Marimba), da "Atollo" - One Instrument // DANIELE DI GREGORIO, Ribattuti (Vienna Symphonic Library Trumpet), da "Atollo" - One Instrument // CUPO MEDITERRANEO, IV (Oli Larkin Kasio), da "Bardo" - One Instrument // GRAND RIVER/PRG/M, Rosenbach Acoustic Piano (70's), da "Rosenbach Acoustic Piano (70's)" - One Instrument // HANNA MARIA/MATTIA ONORI, eKalimba, da "Year 2018" - One Instrument // FJADER, Korg MS-20 Mini, da "One Instrument Vol.1" - One Instrument // MORNING SEANCE, Always Ready To Drop It (Roland Alpha Juno-1), da "Eternal Life Makes Your Past Grow Too Big" - One Instrument // DARWIN GROSSE, Fresco Waltz (Korg ARP 2600 FS), da "Fresco" - One Instrument // FAHMI MURSYID, Wirama (Kendang), da "One Instrument Sessions 03" - One Instrument // MICHIEL DE MALSCHE, Brain Fragments (Balafon by Youssouf Keita), da "Blocks" - One Instrument // MICHIEL DE MALSCHE, Flocking (Moldavian Kaval by Winne Clement), da "Blocks" - One Instrument // GALUN, Leto (Voice), da "Golos" - One Instrument // OR SARFATI, When The Sun Came Out And I Wanted It To Rain (Kamil Mowais Arabic Oud 2007), da "Sky On Concrete Background" - One Instrument

item.title: Vibrisse #36
item.description: MIKE PATTON, Il cielo in una stanza, da "Mondo Cane" – Ipecac Recordings // JOHN ZORN PLAYS THE MUSIC OF ENNIO MORRICONE, Giù la testa (Duck, You Sucker!), da "The Big Gundown" – Elektra Nonesuch // MARC RIBOT Y LOS CUBANOS POSTIZOS, Postizo, da "The Prosthetic Cubans" – Atlantic // GROUND-ZERO, Folhas Secas, da "Plays Standards" – ReR Megacorp // GUANO PADANO, Guano Padano, da "Guano Padano" – Tremoloa Records // THE MELODY FOUR, Besame Mucho, da "On Request" – Chabada // 4WALLS, Ces Gens-là, da "Which Side Are You On" – Red Note // VAKKI PLAKKULA, La Notte Pullula, da "Babirussa Capibara" – Le Arti Malandrine // YANNIS KYRIAKIDES / ANDY MOOR, A School Burnt Down, da "Rebetika" – Unsounds // LAND OF KUSH, Mobil Nil, da "The Big Mango" – Constellation // ROOTS MAGIC, Cloak And Dagger – singolo digitale // KOFI FLEXXX, Apothecary (feat. Billy Woods), da "Flowers In The Dark" – Native Rebel Recordings // WORLD SAXOPHONE QUARTET, Bluocracy Part 1, da "Political Blues" – Justin Time // DANIEL MARCELLUS GIVENS, You Know It, da "Egress" – Aesthetics // IRREVERSIBLE ENTANGLEMENTS, Lágrimas Del Mar, da "Open The Gates" – International Anthem Recording Company // YO LA TENGO, Nuclear War (Version 2), da "Nuclear War" – Matador // LESTER BOWIE, The Great Pretender, da "The Great Pretender" – ECM Records

item.title: Heavy Combination
item.description: SISTER NANCY, Transport Connection, da "600% Dynamite!" – Soul Jazz Records // LIL' ED AND THE BLUES IMPERIALS, Cold Side Of The Bed, da "Slideways" – Alligator Records // PRAED, Al Maraya, da "Al Wahem" – Ruptured // DAVID SHEA, Sitting In A Painted Cave, da "Meditations" – Room 40 // TUNJI OYELANA & THE BENDERS, To Whom It May Concern, da "Tunji Oyelana" – Soundway Records // TUNJI OYELANA & THE BENDERS, Ipasan, da "Tunji Oyelana" – Soundway Records // MURIKI, Passeur, da "Hope" – Funkeria Records // JOSEPH KAMARU, Kenya Kũrũngara, da "Joseph Kamaru, Heavy Combination 1966-2007" – Disciples // JOSEPH KAMARU & KAMARU SUPER STARS, Karolina, da "Joseph Kamaru, Heavy Combination 1966-2007" – Disciples // SANGAZUZA, Sono sa kua de téma, da "AA.VV., Léve Léve Vol.2 (Sao Tomé & Principe sounds 70s - 80s)" – Les Disques Bongo Joe // BULAWÊ N'GULI FALA / QUINTA DAS PALMEIRAS, Tira a mão da minha xuxa, da "AA.VV., Lévé Léve Vol.2 (Sao Tomé & Principe sounds 70s - 80s)" – Les Disques Bongo Joe // SATAN IS MY BROTHER, Roma e Genova, 6 e 8 marzo 2026 // SATAN IS MY BROTHER, Dive, da "Close Your Eyes, See Black" - Dissipatio // SATAN IS MY BROTHER, Deep, da "Close Your Eyes, See Black" - Dissipatio // MASSIMO PUPILLO, BARBARA HANNIGAN, DAVID CHALMIN, Lalala, da "La donna del Lago" - Die Schachtel // MASSIMO PUPILLO, BARBARA HANNIGAN, DAVID CHALMIN, Mezza di voce, da "La donna del Lago" - Die Schachtel

item.title: Sandwich Gelato
item.description: THE TIPTONS SAX QUARTET & DRUMS, Raisa, da "Live In Portland" - Sowie Sound // THE AVANT-GARDE FLAMENCO TRIO, Que Pena, da "Lunar" – Redshift Music // PHEW & DANIELLE DE PICCIOTTO, Im Nebel, da "Paper Masks" – Mute Records // NYTT LAND, Mansi, da "Aba Khan" - Prophecy Productions // A NICE NOISE, Avellino, 7 marzo - 21 maggio 2026 // ANIKA, tour italiano, 7-9 marzo 2026 // SAN VITO JAZZ, 7-28 marzo 2026 // BEAUTIFY JUNKYARDS, Dancer's Reward, da "Nova" - Ghost Box // JIM JARMUSCH AND ANIKA, The Lake 1, da "Father Mother Sister Brother (Original Music From The Film)" - Sacred Bones Records // JAMES BRANDON LEWIS TRIO, Apple Cores #1, da "Apple Cores" - Anti- // SCHNTZL, Hard Fantasy, da "Fata Morgana" – Viernulvier Records // SCHNTZL, Jardin Secret, da "Fata Morgana" – Viernulvier Records // SCHNTZL, The Pearl, da "Fata Morgana" – Viernulvier Records // BOSQUE VACIO, Säk Buj, da "Aves De Nahá" - Dinzu Artefacts // BOSQUE VACÍO, Säk Ch'ich', da "Aves De Nahá" - Dinzu Artefacts // BOSQUE VACÍO, Kok ta', da "Aves De Nahá" - Dinzu Artefacts // NABELÓSE, Hinter Meinen Dünen, da "Haar" - Trost Rcords // NABELÓSE, Niriides, da "Haar" - Trost Records // RYAN J RAFFA/SAM PREKOP, Chamber Music, da "Only Came To Say Goodbye" - Crash Symbols // RYAN J RAFFA/SAM PREKOP, Why Return, da "Only Came To Say Goodbye" - Crash Symbols

item.title: Patterns From Nature
item.description: TENOR SAW, Golden Hen, da "600% Dynamite!" – Soul Jazz Records // PRAED, Assarab, da "Al Wahem" – Ruptured // THE AVANT-GARDE FLAMENCO TRIO, Corazones, da "Lunar" – Redshift Music // PHEW & DANIELLE DE PICCIOTTO, Pixelwissen, da "Paper Masks" – Mute Records // THE TOMEKA REID QUARTET, Oo Long!, da "Dance! Skip! Hop!" – Out Of Your Head Records // QUINSIN NACHOFF, Patterns From Nature I. Branches, da "Patterns From Nature" – Whirlwind Recordings // EIC (EDEN INVERTED COLLECTIVE) FEAT. item.title: A Circle And A Star
item.description: LIL' ED AND THE BLUES IMPERIALS, Bad All By Myself, da "Slideways" – Alligator Records // THE TIPTONS SAX QUARTET & DRUMS, Sparkley Con, da "Live In Portland" - Sowie Sound // NYTT LAND, Taiga, da "Aba Khan" - Prophecy Productions // DAVID SHEA, The Heart Sutra, da "Meditations" – Room 40 // MICA P. HINSON, The Last Train To Texas, da "The Tomorrow Man" - Ponderosa Music Records // NATE MERCEREAU, From One Place To Another, da "excellent Treaveler" - Third Man Records // RAÚL CANTIZANO, Fragmento Ausente, da "Aunque Llegue La Mañana" - Noray Records // JANE WEAVER SEPTIÈME SOEUR, A Circle And A Star, da "The Fallen By Watch Bird (Expanded Edition)" - Fire Records // JANE WEAVER SEPTIÈME SOEUR, The Fallen By Watch Bird, da "The Fallen By Watch Bird (Expanded Edition)" - Fire Records // JANE WEAVER SEPTIÉME SŒUR WITH DEMDIKE STARE, Europium Alluminate, da "The Fallen By Watch Bird (Expanded Edition)" - Fire Records // JEAN-MARIE MERCIMEK, Le Camion, da "Dans Le Camion De Marguerite Duras" - Aguirre Records // JEAN-MARIE MERCIMEK, Une Bouche Regardée, da "Dans Le Camion De Marguerite Duras" - Aguirre Records // JULINKO, Cloudmachine, da "Naebula" - Maple Death Records // JULINKO, Kiss the Lion's Tongue, da "Naebula" - Maple Death Records // NEOPRIMITIVI, L'estasi dello spirito, da "Il sangue è pronto" - 42 Records // NEOPRIMITIVI, L'estasi del corpo, da "Il sangue è pronto" - 42 Records
item.itunes:title: A Circle And A Star
item.itunes:summary: LIL' ED AND THE BLUES IMPERIALS, Bad All By Myself, da "Slideways" – Alligator Records // THE TIPTONS SAX QUARTET & DRUMS, Sparkley Con, da "Live In Portland" - Sowie Sound // NYTT LAND, Taiga, da "Aba Khan" - Prophecy Productions // DAVID SHEA, The Heart Sutra, da "Meditations" – Room 40 // MICA P. HINSON, The Last Train To Texas, da "The Tomorrow Man" - Ponderosa Music Records // NATE MERCEREAU, From One Place To Another, da "excellent Treaveler" - Third Man Records // RAÚL CANTIZANO, Fragmento Ausente, da "Aunque Llegue La Mañana" - Noray Records // JANE WEAVER SEPTIÈME SOEUR, A Circle And A Star, da "The Fallen By Watch Bird (Expanded Edition)" - Fire Records // JANE WEAVER SEPTIÈME SOEUR, The Fallen By Watch Bird, da "The Fallen By Watch Bird (Expanded Edition)" - Fire Records // JANE WEAVER SEPTIÉME SŒUR WITH DEMDIKE STARE, Europium Alluminate, da "The Fallen By Watch Bird (Expanded Edition)" - Fire Records // JEAN-MARIE MERCIMEK, Le Camion, da "Dans Le Camion De Marguerite Duras" - Aguirre Records // JEAN-MARIE MERCIMEK, Une Bouche Regardée, da "Dans Le Camion De Marguerite Duras" - Aguirre Records // JULINKO, Cloudmachine, da "Naebula" - Maple Death Records // JULINKO, Kiss the Lion's Tongue, da "Naebula" - Maple Death Records // NEOPRIMITIVI, L'estasi dello spirito, da "Il sangue è pronto" - 42 Records // NEOPRIMITIVI, L'estasi del corpo, da "Il sangue è pronto" - 42 Records

item.title: BATTITI DAL VIVO Centro d’Arte 2025: Mary Halvorson Amaryllis Sextet
item.description: CRYS COLE & OREN AMBARCHI, Davide Campari, da "Gallivant" – The Black Dot // MARY HALVORSON AMARYLLIS SEXTET // Registrato alla Sala dei Giganti al Liviano, Padova, il 25 ottobre 2025
